name: Act on the Promotion of Ensuring National Security through Integrated Implementation of Economic Measures
description: Act No. 43 of Reiwa 4 (2022). Establishes 4 pillars: supply-chain resilience for specified critical products, critical-infrastructure operator designation and screening, support for critical/advanced technology development, and a non-publication system for sensitive patent applications.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/regulation/cao.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Primary legislation -- excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13, same basis as APPI and the My Number Act.

current_extraction.notes: Only the Cabinet Office's English OVERVIEW document was acquired (not the full statutory text -- japaneselawtranslation.go.jp's full translation remains blocked, HTTP 403, even via a real Playwright browser session, confirmed persistent across this session).

scope.notes: Overview only. Full article text blocked at the only known source.
